sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Receive the joy of your glory, Giving thanks to God, Who has called you into the heav'nly kingdom, Alleluia, Alleluia.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Give thanks to the Lord for he is good, his love is everlasting.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: You believe in me, Thomas, because you have seen me, says the Lord; blessed are they who have not seen me, but still believe

sections.title: Hold On to Love
sections.author: Jesse Manibusan
sections.snippet: There is a place for the sadness. Hold on to Love. There is a season of gladness. Hold on to Love. When pain and confusion seem endless, hold on to Love. We cultivate healing through kindness. Hold on to Love.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Bring your hand and feel the place of the nails, and do not be unbelieving but believing, alleluia

sections.title: In the Breaking of the Bread
sections.author: Timothy R. Smith
sections.snippet: In the breaking of the bread, we knew him, Lord Jesus. Alleluia! Alleluia!

sections.title: Peace
sections.author: Gregory Norbet / Weston Priory
sections.snippet: Peace I leave with you, my friends, peace the world cannot give. Peace I leave with you, my friends, so that your joy be ever full.

sections.title: Sweet Redeemer
sections.author: By Steve Angrisano and Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: King of Kings, blessed Jesus, Hand of mercy, giver of grace; I have come to sing glory, To lay my heart before you In this place.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
